headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Ross Stores (ROST) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Ross Stores, at around US$212 a share, still offers value or if most of the upside is already in the rearview mirror. The stock has recently posted returns of 4.9% over 7 days, 11.2% over 30 days, 16.1% year to date, 62.4% over 1 year, 111.3% over 3 years and 78.7% over 5 years, which naturally puts the current price under the microscope. Recent coverage has focused on Ross Stores as a large off price retailer in the US, highlighting how its discount...
